response.overview: Antonio Ferrani is the owner of a well-known distributor of electronic games for public venues. While he is in his office closing the weekly accounts, the sound of the doorbell interrupts his work. To his surprise, he finds a young and beautiful woman at the door who asks if it would be possible to see some pinball machines to complete the furnishing of her new “duo loft.” At first, Antonio signals to her that he is about to close, but then, struck by her beauty, he decides to let her in. That evening, he will experience the most intense night of his life: the night of games.
response.title: La Notte dei Giochi
